summary: Built the Memory capability with four modules: db_helpers (singleton DuckDB connection + generic query-to-dict helper), contact_manager (upsert with email/phone dedup, find, get, update, list), conversation_logger (log, get with filters, end), and decision_queue (create/resolve/expire lifecycle). All functions return plain Python dicts, use UUID v4 IDs, and respect the existing office.db schema without modification. All 5 scenarios pass.
decisions: Used parents[3] for path resolution in db_helpers.py (3 levels deep from workspace root)
Upsert dedup: email first, then phone — prevents duplicates on either field
Audit writer import is optional (try/except) since D1.1 runs in parallel — graceful degradation
broadcast: Memory API: Import from Zoffice.capabilities.memory.{contact_manager, conversation_logger, decision_queue}. All functions return plain dicts. DB path configurable via memory/config.yaml. get_db() for direct connection if needed.
